auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Agiled API token sent as the api_token query parameter. Create or view it in Settings > API Settings in your Agiled account: https://my.agiled.app/developers.

extraFields.label: Account URL
extraFields.description: Your Agiled account URL sent in the Brand header. Copy it from the browser address bar after signing in to your Agiled workspace.

role.description: Contact role, such as Client, Lead, or Prospect.

next_follow_up.description: Whether the contact needs a next follow-up.

last_contacted.description: Date the contact was last contacted.

inputSchema.description: Request body for creating or updating an Agiled CRM contact.

anyOf.description: Contact role such as Client, Lead, or Prospect.

start_date.description: Project start date using the company's configured date format.

deadline.description: Project deadline using the company's configured date format.

manual_time_log.description: Whether manual time logging is enabled, usually 1 or 0.

client_view_task.description: Whether the client can view tasks, usually 1 or 0.

allow_client_notification.description: Whether client notifications are allowed, usually 1 or 0.

inputSchema.description: Request body for creating an Agiled project.

start_date.description: Task start date using the company's configured date format.

due_date.description: Task due date using the company's configured date format.

completed_on.description: Task completion date using the company's configured date format.

billable.description: Whether the task is billable, usually 1 or 0.

inputSchema.description: Request body for creating an Agiled task.

anyOf.description: Whether the task is billable, usually 1 or 0.

deleted.description: Whether Agiled accepted the delete request.
